title: Will Trump Build the Oasis Plan in Gaza/Israel?  —  Scott Ritter and Larry  Wilkerson
description:
Watch the full video of the International Peace Coalition Meeting No.85:
Ceasefire Reached in Gaza: Now It’s Time To End the Genocide of Geopolitics
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sZP0sNrTnX0

Watch "The Oasis Plan" Video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hjfFHIiXPmE

Don't wait for the holdovers from the “rules-based order” to change their ways anytime soon. And don’t count on Trump either, though his contribution to the ceasefire in Gaza is certainly welcome. Instead, become an active force for change yourself.

RSVP for the weekly International Peace Coalition:https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/ipc_meeting
